<!--
Thanks for contributing to Pulsate! Please keep PRs small and focused.
Commit messages follow Conventional Commits and must carry a DCO `Signed-off-by:`
line (`git commit -s`). See CONTRIBUTING.md and docs/18-open-source.md.
-->

## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

The motivation / issue this addresses. Link issues: `Closes #...`.

## How

Notable implementation details, trade-offs, or follow-ups.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated (rustdoc and/or `docs/`) if behavior changed
- [ ] Commits are signed off (DCO) and follow Conventional Commits
